description: dotnet-artisan harness — smart defaults for .NET projects. Auto-loads skills, allows dotnet CLI, enforces quality.

hooks.command: echo '[dotnet-artisan] .NET project detected. Loading using-dotnet → dotnet-advisor → domain skills. Baseline: dotnet-csharp. Read CLAUDE.md for rules.'

if echo "${CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT}" | grep -qiE '(c#|\.net|asp\.net|blazor|maui|ef core|winui|wpf|winform|xunit|nuget|msbuild|nanot aot|grpc|signalr)'; then echo '[dotnet-artisan] .NET intent detected. Decision-maker (dotnet-advisor) will analyze version, route to specialists, and ask clarifying questions before coding.'; fi

file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:file_path}"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.cs$'; then if ! head -5 "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(//|public|sealed|internal|static|partial|record|class|struct|interface|enum)'; then echo '[dotnet-artisan] Reminder: add a one-line purpose comment at the top of new .cs files (SELF_DOCUMENTING.md).'; fi; fi
